# BuffInfo.SkillId property

The skill that applies this buff (BuffTable.SkillId); 0 when unknown. Used to attribute an Imagine-lockout debuff back to its source Imagine via [`IGameDataResonance`](../../Stellar.Abstractions.Services/IGameDataResonance.md).

```csharp
public int SkillId { get; set; }
```
